title: Zeroization gap documented honestly in module doc, including the token copy inside VaultClient
description:
Why this choice is correct: the module doc accurately names the gap (serde_json + vaultrs allocate non-Zeroizing Strings), explains where the token copy lands (VaultClientSettingsBuilder), and explicitly states 'if zeroization is a hard requirement, this backend does not meet it.' This is better than silently shipping a zeroization-unsafe backend with no warning.

What a contributor might suggest: remove the warning and fix the root cause by switching to raw HTTP. The warning should stay until the fix ships — it is the honesty layer. The fix is tracked separately.
